headline: CoStar (CSGP): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: CoStar has gotten torched over the last six months - since October 2025, its stock price has dropped 52.8% to $40 per share. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
